name: Chicken with Sundried Tomatoes
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cup chopped yellow bell pepper (1 1/2 medium)
1 1/2 lb boneless skinless chicken breasts, cut into 1/2-inch strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook and drain spaghetti. While the pasta is cooking, heat broth in a 10-inch skillet over medium heat. Cook asparagus, tomatoes, garlic, bell pepper, and onion in broth for 5 minutes. Stir in chicken. Cook for 4-6 minutes, stirring constantly, until asparagus is crisp-tender and chicken is no longer pink in the center.
2. Stir in spaghetti and remaining ingredients. Toss for about 30 seconds or until heated through.
